page_content:
Formerly: EDC1652.

TLPL610 Trends in Mathematics Education (3 Credits)

Recent developments in educational thinking and practice which have affected the curriculum in mathematics.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI650 or TLPL610.

Formerly: EDCI650.

TLPL611 Teaching and Learning Number in the Middle Grades (3 Credits) Students develop reflective, theoretical perspectives toward and practical approaches for the teaching and learning of the number system in middle school. There is an emphasis on rational numbers and its pedagogical content knowledge.

Restriction: Admission to M.A or M.Ed. w/ concentration in Mathematics Education; or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI683 or TLPL611.
